_comment: Tests CONSTRAINT PIVOT RULE, FIRST APPOINTMENT EXCEPTION, preferred_time clock-time payload, and preferred_time_nearest response handling added 2026-06-21.

scenarios.name: FIRST APPOINTMENT EXCEPTION — offer single earliest slot, not first+last

history.content: Any time on a Saturday, preferably the first appointment.

{"success": true, "found": true, "band_filtered_range": true, "practitioners": [{"practitioner_id": "1670506736215139927", "practitioner_name": "Priya Ramesh", "business_id": "1670268316599461611", "business_name": "Group One Medical", "dates": [{"date": "2026-06-27", "day_of_week": "Saturday, June 27th", "slot_groups": {"morning": ["10 AM", "11:20 AM", "11:40 AM"], "afternoon": ["12 PM", "12:20 PM"]}}]}], "first_available": {"practitioner_name": "Priya Ramesh", "time": "10 AM", "date": "2026-06-27", "day_of_week": "Saturday, June 27th", "business_name": "Group One Medical"}, "requested_weekday": "Saturday"}

scenarios.expected_behavior: PASS if agent says ONLY '10 AM' (or 'The first available Saturday with Priya is at 10 AM') without mentioning 11:40 AM or any second time. FAIL if agent offers '10 AM or 11:40 AM' (SLOT OFFER HARD RULE applied when FIRST APPOINTMENT EXCEPTION should have fired).

scenarios.name: CONSTRAINT PIVOT RULE — keep Saturday constraint when caller asks for different instance

history.content: The first available Saturday with Priya is at 10 AM on the 27th at Group One Medical — does that work?
Is there something earlier? Maybe a different week?

scenarios.expected_behavior: PASS if agent calls smart_voice_agent with intent=find_next_available AND requested_weekday='Saturday' in the payload (keeping the Saturday constraint). FAIL if agent calls without requested_weekday, or calls with a different weekday, or speaks a response without calling the tool.

scenarios.name: preferred_time in payload — clock time on recurring-day search

history.content: I'd like a Saturday appointment at around 9am with Priya.

scenarios.expected_behavior: PASS if agent calls smart_voice_agent with intent=find_next_available, requested_weekday='Saturday', AND preferred_time='9am' (or '9:00' or '09:00') in the payload. FAIL if preferred_time is absent, set to 'morning', or if agent asks for more detail before calling.

scenarios.name: preferred_time_nearest — acknowledge gap when no exact match

history.content: {"success": true, "found": true, "band_filtered_range": true, "preferred_time": "9am", "preferred_time_nearest": {"slot": "9:40 AM", "date": "2026-07-11", "exact_match": false}, "practitioners": [{"practitioner_id": "1670506736215139927", "practitioner_name": "Priya Ramesh", "business_id": "1670268316599461611", "business_name": "Group One Medical", "dates": [{"date": "2026-07-11", "day_of_week": "Saturday, July 11th", "preferred_time_nearest": "9:40 AM", "slot_groups": {"morning": ["9:40 AM", "10 AM", "10:20 AM"], "afternoon": ["12 PM"]}}]}], "requested_weekday": "Saturday"}

scenarios.expected_behavior: PASS if agent explicitly states there is no 9 AM slot and surfaces 9:40 AM as the closest (e.g. 'I don't have a 9 AM — the closest is 9:40 AM on July 11th'). FAIL if agent silently applies SLOT OFFER HARD RULE (e.g. '9:40 AM or 10 AM') without acknowledging the 9 AM gap.
